name: Mrs Fields Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the margarine and sugars together until fluffy.
2. Add the egg, vanilla extract, flour, and oats to the mixture. Mix on low speed until well combined.
3. Stir in the raisins and coarsely chopped walnuts.
4. Drop heaping tablespoons of dough onto a greased cookie sheet, spacing them about 2 1/2 inches apart.
5. Bake at 325°F for 17 minutes or until the edges are lightly browned and the tops appear dry.
6. Allow to cool on the baking sheets for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
